title: Student Records (Local Policy)
description: This policy governs how student records are created, maintained, and shared within the school district, including a wide range of documents such as academic transcripts, disciplinary records, and — following a recent update — school library records. It applies to all students enrolled in the district, as well as the staff, administrators, and other parties who may access or handle those records. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because it defines what information the school keeps about their children, who can see it, and how it is protected.

timeline.summary: Policy FL (Student Records) was updated to add a new item #16 under Types of Education Records, specifically adding 'Records relating to school library materials the student obtains from a school library.' The existing item 16 (Other records) was renumbered to 17.
changes_added: 16. Records relating to school library materials the student obtains from a school library.
